engagement.name: HealthBridge GTM Expansion
engagement.desired_outcome: Go-to-market strategy for expanding HealthBridge's B2B SaaS platform from general practice management into the mid-market healthcare vertical (clinics with 50-500 staff)
engagement.scope: Mid-market vertical expansion into healthcare, DACH + US markets
constraints: Sales team has no healthcare vertical experience
Regulatory compliance (HIPAA, GDPR-health) required before market entry
